name: Kabukicho Information Point
hours_note: Use during active business hours for orientation.
cost_note: Free to use as a reference point.
gray_zone_note: Unofficial meetup guidance may vary by venue.
caution_note: Do not assume staff will provide navigation help.
description: A stable meetup and orientation point for first-time visitors.

name: 24h Convenience Cluster
hours_note: Many locations operate late or 24h, but individual hours may differ.
gray_zone_note: Availability can change with store policy or local conditions.
caution_note: Verify store hours before relying on it overnight.
description: Late-night supplies, water, and quick restock options.

name: Well-Lit Main Route
hours_note: Preferred route after dark when the area is active.
gray_zone_note: Lighting and crowd conditions can change by time of night.
caution_note: Stay aware of local crowd density and closures.
description: Primary walking corridor with lower navigation friction after dark.

name: Quiet Exit Lane
hours_note: Best used when nearby streets are open and passable.
gray_zone_note: May be less practical during peak nightlife congestion.
caution_note: Confirm that the route remains open and safe to use.
description: A lower-noise path for leaving crowded blocks quickly.

name: Community Note Anchor
hours_note: Depends on moderation and contribution availability.
cost_note: Free to read; community updates are optional.
gray_zone_note: User tips are informative but not authoritative.
caution_note: Treat community notes as unconfirmed until reviewed.
description: A reviewable point for verified user updates and local tips.

name: Late-Night Toilet Checkpoint
hours_note: Use only when the venue or facility is confirmed open.
cost_note: May require a purchase or facility access.
gray_zone_note: Access can vary by building policy and time of night.
caution_note: Confirm access rules before relying on this as a route decision.
description: A practical reminder point for nearby toilet access decisions.

name: Smoking Area Checkpoint
hours_note: Availability depends on venue policy and time of day.
cost_note: Usually free if publicly accessible; venue rules apply.
gray_zone_note: Smoking rules may change with building policy or local regulation.
caution_note: Do not assume indoor smoking is allowed without confirmation.
description: A decision point for checking where smoking is actually permitted.

name: Short-Stay Rest Spot
cost_note: Potentially free if it is a public resting point; otherwise follow venue rules.
gray_zone_note: Rest practicality depends on crowding and nearby access conditions.
caution_note: Use as a short pause point, not a guaranteed rest area.
description: A low-friction checkpoint for short breaks and regrouping.
